summary: Set 029 Session 2 ships the orchestrator-indicator gauges end-to-end for the Claude Code surface (0.14.2). Webview view + provider with marker reader/watcher + Claude SessionStart + UserPromptSubmit hook installer + shared write-orchestrator-marker.js helper + 8 Playwright scenarios all green. Three verification rounds against gpt-5-4 surfaced 5 must-fix items total (Round A: TOCTOU race, UserPromptSubmit clobber, stripes painted behind SVG; Round B: effort suffix keyed off wrong signal source, gauge angle math inverted y-axis), all addressed, plus a Round C confirmation surfaced one residual race-window in the UserPromptSubmit branch which was tightened mechanically. Round-by-round finding count was 3->2->1 - convergence not spiral per memory feedback_verifier_spiral_recruit_codex; no Round D. S2 routed cost: $0.578 (A $0.152 + B $0.206 + C $0.220). Cumulative set cost: $1.423 against the operator's $5.00 NTE. Mid-S2 operator-on-device feedback drove a sizing+layout revision (gauge SVG 70x38 -> 100x54, fonts +40-50%, container max-height 100 -> 150px, responsive wrap at <260px panel widths, Medium effort needle re-centered from -120 to -90 for visual symmetry with the Model gauge). The audit-locked '<=100px hard constraint' D3 phrasing is now superseded; documented via superseding notes in audit-summary.md and spec.md plus a new CHANGELOG section. Pre-implementation verification (WebFetch against the official Claude Code hooks docs) confirmed all three R7 preconditions: /clear fires SessionStart with source:clear, /think* are per-message escalations not session settings, UserPromptSubmit exposes the prompt field with message text - so the SessionStart hook clobbers effort to Medium on every source value and the /think* prefix detection ships at full functionality. Key locked design Session 3 inherits: multi-writer precedence helper with re-read-immediately-before-rename closing the TOCTOU window, retry loop (5 attempts at 50/200/600/1200ms), confidence-low producer rule, visual-treatment matrix per signalKind (stripes are stale-only), responsive wrap. Spec drift corrections logged: version bump direction (spec said 0.13.17->0.13.18 pre-Set-030; corrected to 0.14.1->0.14.2), Playwright path (spec said tests/playwright/; actual is src/test/playwright/). New memory saved this session: project_gauges_sizing_followup (updated from queued-for-future to SHIPPED). Two pre-existing test failures in npm run test:unit (notificationsSection, configEditor-foundation) reproduce on master without S2 changes and are unrelated.

reason.specifics: Session 3 adds the non-Claude provider detection paths: Codex auto-detect via ~/.codex/config.toml watcher (uses the existing helper's --mode configured-default with the precedence policy that already correctly skips writes when a fresher current/Claude signal exists - smoke-tested in S2), Gemini Code Assist manual-only + GitHub Copilot manual-only (each ships an installer command that opens the manual-override quickpick with provider preset), and the universal manual-override quickpick with MRU + multi-step flow + hotkey-bindable args + force-override confirmation. ai-assignment.md recommends Claude Opus 4.7 @ effort=high for the same multi-file coherence requirements as S2 (config-watcher shim + 3 commands + manual quickpick UX + Playwright smoke expansion); each provider's detection mechanism is its own little system. S2 shipped the shared writer helper with all four modes already wired (session-start, user-prompt-submit, manual, configured-default), so S3's new writers are pure consumers of the helper API.
